header: Check the list. Then check the price: €0.

items.title: 244 content elements in 10 groups
items.description_text: From heroes to footers, each built on Content Blocks 2.2 with its own backend preview.

items.title: 49 Fluid 5 components
items.description_text: 17 atoms, 28 molecules, and 4 layout primitives — for your own templates too.

items.title: 15 theme presets plus custom
items.description_text: Runtime-switchable, with per-page overrides that inherit down the rootline.

items.title: Optional integrations
items.description_text: News, Powermail, Solr, blog, 8 Form Framework forms, Friendly Captcha, and Brevo.

items.title: One-command demo seeding
items.description_text: Styleguide and starter site seeders — idempotent, workspaces-safe, client-demo ready.
